## 1. Security audit — run completed, scripts need Cursor fix

**Status:** Audit ran. Report: `strategy/security/audit_2026-06-30.md`. **All "0 findings" results are false cleans — significant tools failed silently.**

| Error | Location | Root cause | Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Argument list too long` | `lib_anomaly_write.sh:106`, `run_audit.sh:116` | OS `ARG_MAX` exceeded by env var length when exec-ing tool binaries | pip-audit, npm audit, semgrep **did not run** |
| `AttributeError: module 'ast' has no attribute 'Num'` | bandit (all files) | Python 3.14 removed `ast.Num`; installed bandit predates it | bandit SAST **did not scan** — falsely reports "0 issues" |
| `skipped — not a git repo` | gitleaks (all 3 repos) | Invoked against submodule `.git` file paths, not repo roots | Secret scanning **did not run** |

**Net effect:** Audit cannot be trusted until scripts are fixed.

**Actions:**
- [ ] **Cursor:** Fix `run_audit.sh` + `lib_anomaly_write.sh` — `env -i` wrapper or `xargs`/directory invocation to avoid `ARG_MAX`; upgrade bandit to ≥1.8.0; fix gitleaks to invoke from subrepo roots or pass `--source`
- [x] **HitM:** Crons set up this morning — timing adjustment pending; will re-run manually after Cursor confirms scripts clean

## 2. Profile tab — BLACK SCREEN BUG 🔴 (P1 — dispatch immediately)

**NEW — reported 2026-06-30 by HitM.**

**Issue:** Profile tab in main navigation renders a black screen (confirmed dark mode context) and is inoperable in production. Core navigation item — affects all users who navigate to their profile/account settings.

**Severity:** P1. Profile is a primary nav destination; users cannot access account settings, subscription info, or account management. Regression is live on VPS.

**Likely cause:** Dark mode CSS mismatch — component likely has a hardcoded background or missing `dark:` class that makes the panel invisible in dark mode. Not a data bug; CSS/theme issue.

**Actions:**
- [ ] **Cursor:** Bug fix slice — investigate ProfilePage/ProfileTab component for dark mode CSS conflict; restore visible rendering in both light and dark themes; smoke on VPS
- [ ] File anomaly: `strategy/anomalies/2026-06-30_PROFILE-TAB_black-screen-nav.md` (Claude Code, this session)

## 4. Walkthrough repeat-trigger bug + Dexie privacy issues

**Core bug:** F-007 walkthrough auto-triggers on every visit to savings goals and datahub. No completion state is persisted. Assessment: missed acceptance criterion on F-007, not a regression.

**Fix scope (Cursor):** Per-tour completion flag in `localStorage`; tours auto-start once per user lifetime; re-run via Help mode.

**New issues surfaced by HitM:**

### 4a. Dexie localStorage opt-out — Privacy Policy gap 🔴

**Issue:** No functional mechanism exists for users to opt out of Dexie (IndexedDB) local storage. Privacy Policy states opt-out is available, which means the app is currently non-compliant with its own stated policy.

**Required behavior:**
- Opt-out toggle in settings/profile with clear warning: "Disabling offline storage will disable all offline functionality"
- App must fail gracefully if Dexie is unavailable (user opted out or browser blocked IndexedDB)
- Current code likely assumes Dexie is always present — this needs a defensive fallback path

**Priority:** High — privacy policy compliance. Cursor task required.

### 4b. Multi-user per device — Dexie/PWA conflict investigation

**Issue:** If two users use the same PWA or browser, Dexie and the service worker cache may serve the wrong user's data to the wrong session. Scope is unknown.

**Action:** Parked for investigation. Do not ship multi-user improvements without understanding this first.

**Actions:**
- [ ] **Cursor:** Fix F-007 tour completion persistence (`localStorage` flag per tour)
- [ ] **Cursor:** Add Dexie opt-out toggle (settings/profile); graceful Dexie-unavailable degradation path across all offline-capable pages
- [ ] **Parked (investigation):** Multi-user Dexie/PWA worker conflict — add to parking lot; investigate before any multi-user feature work
